title: Jessica Kandel
summary: A doctor and surviving scientist involved in the nationwide effort to create a broad-spectrum antiviral.

claims.text: The official recap identifies Jessica Kandel as a doctor and one of the surviving scientists working after the outbreak.
Kandel is involved in creating a broad-spectrum antiviral alongside other surviving virologists and scientists.

paragraphs.text: Kandel's role connects scientific work established in the first game with The Division 2's missions to recover antivirals, a perfusion bioreactor and specialist support.

verification.notes: Specific laboratory work and dialogue require direct mission or collectible evidence.
